title: B2B Quote Builder
description: Create customized budgets, adjust your margins and share them easily with your clients.
emptyDescription: Select "Add to Quote" from any hotel or room in our search results to start building your budget.
globalMarkupHint: Move this slider to adjust the markup on all new items immediately.
documentWarning: Dear client, the rates and availability presented in this quote are subject to change without prior notice by the suppliers. We recommend confirming the services as soon as possible to guarantee the displayed price.
documentFooter1: Document generated via automated system for
documentFooter2: For questions about this quote, please contact the agent in charge.
checkoutToastDescription: The batch checkout functionality for complete quotes is currently in development.
